name: Prakash Steelage Limited
summary: Prakash Steelage Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of stainless steel welded pipes, tubes, and U-tubes in India and internationally. The company also trades in stainless steel products. Its customers include a set of industries, which comprise oil and gas, power, pharmaceutical, petrochemical, sugar, dairy, automobile, desalination, etc. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Mumbai, India.
